title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at SAP India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at SAP India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
SAP India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!
